name: Balls & Clubs Golf
about: Balls & Clubs Golf is a virtual golf simulator venue offering an entertaining experience for golfers of all skill levels. They provide access to top-notch golf simulators that teleport players to world-renowned courses, eliminating the need for traditional golf course access or physical exertion. The venue caters to both PGA-level professionals and casual players, focusing on making the sport fun and accessible through a variety of rental options for different events and swing moods.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-renowned golf courses without leaving the venue
Variety of rental options to suit different swing moods and events
Top-notch golf simulator technology providing an immersive golfing experience

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, suitable for casual dining during golf sessions
BYOB allowed, venue allows bringing your own beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides club rentals, allowing you to enjoy the golf simulators without needing to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, Balls & Clubs allows BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage), making it suitable for casual dining and socializing during your golf session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and skill level, as simulators allow for faster gameplay than traditional golf.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Balls & Clubs is family-friendly and welcomes kids, making it suitable for family outings and junior golfers.
